transactions.desc: The Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Trey Pooser to the St. Louis Cardinals.
The Kansas City Royals traded OF Rudy Martin to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Tigers recalled Hanifee from Triple-A Toledo on Friday.
The Giants designated Haase for assignment Friday.
The Giants reinstated Susac (back) from the injured list Friday.
The Padres optioned Duran to Triple-A El Paso on Friday.
The Padres reinstated Fermin (head) from the injured list Friday.
The Cardinals designated Pozo for assignment Friday.
The Cardinals selected Blewett's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Diamondbacks recalled Locklear from Triple-A Reno on Friday.
The Red Sox released Thaiss on Friday, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
The Astros activated Teng (knee) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Astros selected Spence's contract from Triple-A Sugar Land on Friday.
The Brewers optioned Koenig to Triple-A Nashville on Friday.
The Brewers activated McCullers (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Orioles recalled Sanders from Triple-A Norfolk on Friday.
The Nationals recalled Ford from Triple-A Rochester on Friday.
The Reds optioned Johnson to Triple-A Louisville on Friday.
The Reds activated Myers (shoulder) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Rays recalled Englert from Triple-A Durham on Friday and will have him start or pitch in bulk relief in the second game of their doubleheader versus the Red Sox, Ryan Bass of Rays.tv reports.
The Red Sox recalled Gamboa from Triple-A Worcester on Friday, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
Marlowe exercised an opt-out clause in his minor-league contract with the Athletics and became free agent Thursday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports.
The Orioles recalled Encarnacion-Strand from Triple-A Norfolk on Thursday, Jake Rill of MLB.com reports.
Jones cleared waivers Thursday and elected free agency, Todd Rosiak of the Milwaukee Journal Sentinel reports.
The Washington Nationals traded OF Robert Hassell to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
The Phillies recalled Johnson from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Thursday.
The Mets designated Short for assignment Thursday.
The Mets reinstated Semien (hip) from the injured list Thursday.
The Pirates acquired Hassell from the Nationals on Thursday in exchange for cash considerations or a player to be named later.
The Reds have agreed to terms with Burns on a seven-year, $105 million contract extension, Jon Morosi of MLB Network reports.
